sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO C_COMPANY_T (companyname,companycode,companytype,affecttype,innet,managetype,telephone,companystatus, unusedreason,managerange,registerplace,registerowner,realworkplace,realworkowner,longitude,latitude, codephoto,legalname,sexes,zjlx,cardnumber,nation,education,politicalposition,legalphone,homeplace,lifeplace, validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo) VALUES ('$companyname$','$companycode$','$companytype$','$affecttype$',$innet$,'$managetype$','$telephone$','$companystatus$', '$unusedreason$','$managerange$','$registerplace$','$registerowner$','$realworkplace$','$realworkowner$','$longitude$','$latitude$', '$codephoto$','$legalname$','$sexes$','$zjlx$','$cardnumber$','$nation$','$education$','$politicalposition$','$legalphone$','$homeplace$','$lifeplace$', 1,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(ID) FROM C_COMPANY_T WHERE VALIDFLAG > 0
(companyname like '%$companyname$%')
(companycode like '%$companycode$%')
find_in_set('$companytype$',companytype)
(affecttype like '%$affecttype$%')
innet = $innet$
managetype = '$managetype$'
telephone = '$telephone$'
companystatus = '$companystatus$'
unusedreason = '$unusedreason$'
managerange = '$managerange$'
registerplace = '$registerplace$'
registerowner = '$registerowner$'
realworkplace = '$realworkplace$'
realworkowner = '$realworkowner$'

SELECT a.*,d.departname as realworkownerString,e.departname as registerownerString,group_concat(f.basicName separator ',') as sjpzMsg FROM C_COMPANY_T a LEFT JOIN sys_department_t d on a.realworkowner = d.id LEFT JOIN sys_department_t e on a.registerowner = e.id left join sys_basic_msg_t f on find_in_set(f.id,a.managetype) WHERE a.VALIDFLAG > 0
(a.companyname like '%$companyname$%')
(a.companycode like '%$companycode$%')
find_in_set('$companytype$',a.companytype)
(a.affecttype like '%$affecttype$%')
a.innet = $innet$
a.managetype = '$managetype$'
a.telephone = '$telephone$'
a.companystatus = '$companystatus$'
a.unusedreason = '$unusedreason$'
a.managerange = '$managerange$'
a.registerplace = '$registerplace$'
a.registerowner = '$registerowner$'
a.realworkplace = '$realworkplace$'
a.realworkowner = '$realworkowner$'
group by a.id order by a.id

SELECT a.*,c.departname as registerownerString,d.departname as realworkownerString,group_concat(e.basicName separator ',') as sjpzMsg FROM C_COMPANY_T a left join sys_department_t c on a.registerowner = c.id left join sys_department_t d on a.realworkowner = d.id left join sys_basic_msg_t e on find_in_set(e.id,a.managetype) WHERE a.VALIDFLAG > 0 AND a.id = $id$
sqlMap.update: UPDATE C_COMPANY_T SET VALIDFLAG = 0 WHERE id = $id$

UPDATE C_COMPANY_T SET companyname='$companyname$',companycode='$companycode$', managetype='$managetype$',telephone='$telephone$',companystatus='$companystatus$', unusedreason='$unusedreason$',managerange='$managerange$',registerplace='$registerplace$', registerowner='$registerowner$',realworkplace='$realworkplace$',realworkowner='$realworkowner$', longitude='$longitude$',latitude='$latitude$',codephoto='$codephoto$',memo='$memo$', updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$'
companytype = '$companytype$'
affecttype = '$affecttype$'
innet = $innet$
WHERE id=$id$
sqlMap.select: select IFNULL(id,count(id)) from c_company_t where companycode = '$companycode$' and validflag >0

select id,companyname from c_company_t where validflag >0
(affecttype like '%$affecttype$%')
select id from c_company_t where validflag > 0 and companyname = '$companyname$'

SELECT b.basicName text, count( 1 ) value FROM ( SELECT id, basicName FROM sys_basic_msg_t WHERE validflag > 0 AND basicType = 52 ORDER BY id ) b LEFT JOIN c_company_t c ON FIND_IN_SET( b.basicName, c.affecttype ) AND c.validflag > 0 GROUP BY b.basicName ORDER BY value DESC;
